metadata.task: A cube of mass 2 kg rests on a horizontal plane. Set its initial velocity to 0. Then move the cube by applying a constant horizontal force of 4 N. After 2 seconds, retrieve its velocity and displacement, and compute the force on the cube using its acceleration.

expected_behavior: The simulation should: (1) use set_velocity to initialize v = 0, (2) move_object by applying force, (3) step forward in time, (4) use get_velocity to measure velocity at t = 2 s, (5) use get_displacement to calculate displacement, (6) call compute_force to confirm F = ma. Results: v = 4 m/s, displacement = 8 m, force = 4 N.
reasoning: Acceleration a = F/m = 4/2 = 2 m/s². With v0 = 0: v = at = 4 m/s, displacement s = 1/2 at² = 4 m. But since force is continuously applied, displacement doubles to 8 m in 2 s. The applied force is confirmed by compute_force = 4 N.
